scripts.lh: npm run tokens && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.perf poetry run python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && lhci autorun
scripts.lh:open: open $(python -c "import json; print(' '.join(r['htmlPath'] for r in json.load(open('.lighthouseci/manifest.json')) if r['isRepresentativeRun']))")
